title: Wrote the first line of code
description: Built a clumsy little website for a school club and got hooked on making things that other people could use.

title: Graduated in Computer Science
description: Finished a degree heavy on systems and human-centred design, then jumped straight into shipping product.

title: Joined Demo Labs as a Junior Engineer
description: Learned how real teams ship software, from code review etiquette to keeping the lights on at 3am.

title: Shipped a data-driven portfolio world
description: Released the first interactive, explorable portfolio that anyone could re-skin by editing plain data files.

title: Started exploring AI-assisted authoring
description: Began prototyping tools that let non-developers populate immersive scenes through natural-language editing.
